$comment: Size budgets for the built docs site (.vitepress/dist), enforced by documentation/scripts/check-dist-budget.mjs in docs.yml. Baseline 2026-07-20 after the sidebar diet: total 145 MB, api avg 33 KB / p95 47 KB, largest asset llms-full.txt 6.9 MB. Budgets carry ~30% headroom; lower them when the site shrinks, never raise them casually - a breach means an SSR/asset amplification regressed.
